arts.ttl: ‘Chelsea in the lead’ – Blues out in front for Champions League star, and could get discount too
arts.sum: Chelsea are currently leading the race for Borussia Dortmund striker Serhou Guirassy and could get him for less than his €70m release clause too. That’s according to Calciomercato.it, who follow up a report from earlier today about Chelsea’s interest and insist they’re very much out in front at this moment in time. arts.ttl: Chelsea add two players to Enzo Maresca's squad and three debut vs Legia Warsaw in huge changes
arts.sum: After back-to-back draws against Brentford and Ipswich Town - two of the three most winnable games between now and the end of the season, possibly only with the visit of the worst Manchester United side in Premier League history still to come, and even then Chelsea have a poor record in the fixture of late - there is real pressure on. So Maresca can be excused for looking beyond Thursday night's Conference League quarter-final second leg.

arts.ttl: Report: The response Chelsea got after exploring surprise Liverpool transfer raid
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly explored a surprise transfer deal for Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk, only to find that he was always looking likely to sign a new contract. Van Dijk’s new deal with Liverpool was officially confirmed earlier today, with the Netherlands international putting speculation to bed and committing his future to the Reds. arts.ttl: Chelsea receive HUGE transfer update over 'best player in the world'
arts.sum: Andrey Santos will reportedly be given the chance to impress Enzo Maresca at this summer’s Club World Cup as he is set to be included in Chelsea ’s squad for the inaugural tournament. Chelsea are yet to finalise whether Santos will be included in their first-team squad for next season, despite his immense displays for Strasbourg, and they will reportedly not make a final decision on his future until after the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.ttl: ‘Especially Chelsea’ – Blues set for fight with Antonio Conte for player, Premier League his likeliest destination
arts.sum: Chelsea could be set for a battle with former manager Antonio Conte for Borussia Dortmund star Serhou Guirassy this summer. That’s according to journalist Maurizio Russo, who reports that the Premier League are focused on Guirassy and ‘especially Chelsea’. arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'set asking price' for Renato Veiga amid Juventus interest
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly set an asking price for Renato Veiga amid suggestions that Juventus want to sign the Portugal international on a permanent deal.
